title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shiprocket. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Distribution Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
